meaning: adj.作用于精神的,影响(或改变)心理状态的
examples: Caffeine, the stimulant in coffee, has been called "the most widely used psychoactive substance on Earth".
The problem is that the compound has mixed effects in the brain, a not unusual occurrence with psychoactive drugs.
It is psychoactive, a stimulant and addictive.
It says that, between 2009 and 2011, 114 new psychoactive drugs were identified in the European Union.
Strathclyde Police said Annihilation was one of many psychoactive substances they been made aware of in recent months.
